channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18904] interop sanity test_230k: FAIL: migrate -m 1,3 failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3b105e35-168a-46e9-82c8-a0d6a6faa4a5

test_230k failed with the following error:

== sanity test 230k: file data not changed after dir migration ========================================================== 21:35:57 (1744061757)
lmv_stripe_count: 2 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: fnv_1a_64
mdtidx		 FID[seq:oid:ver]
     0		 [0x200006990:0x13:0x0]		
     1		 [0x240005223:0x3:0x0]		
10 files on MDT0
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.4 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.2 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.16 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.20 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.15 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.18 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.12 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.6 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.8 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.5 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.17 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.7 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.1 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.19 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.10 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.3 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.13 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.11 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.9 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
lfs migrate: /mnt/lustre/d230k.sanity/f230k.sanity.14 migrate failed: File descriptor in bad state (77)
 sanity test_230k: @@@@@@ FAIL: migrate -m 1,3 failed

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/101 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_12/170 - 3.10.0-1160.81.1.el7_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_230k - migrate -m 1,3 failed
item.summary: interop sanity test_230k: FAIL: migrate -m 1,3 failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58932/
Subject: LU-18904 llite: set hash fnv_1a_64 for old server
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 19e6393c24e2fe2901806a0ff1ca3c13c487d663

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58722/
Subject: LU-18904 tests: skip sanity/230k for older servers
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: e6172ff4af5f4b86d5ae82f1f4bc484b4fd9f6d0
